summary: Beginner Course Pronunciation Check feature testing completed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: UI verified with vocabulary section, Listen buttons, and Mic buttons working correctly. Azure Speech SDK integration confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: Pronunciation words API (/api/beginner/pronunciation/words/{topic}) returns proper phonetic guides with IPA notation and simplified pronunciation
Pronunciation assessment API (/api/beginner/pronunciation/assess) correctly handles Azure Speech SDK integration with proper error handling for None scores
Frontend BeginnerCourse.js correctly implements vocabulary section with Listen and Mic buttons for each word
Star rating feedback UI (1-5 stars) properly displays based on pronunciation score
Feedback includes main_feedback, encouragement, and tips as expected
Microphone recording flow correctly requests browser permissions and handles errors gracefully
seed_data_creation: None - Using existing beginner English lessons with vocabulary data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beginner Pronunciation feature fully tested. Backend APIs: /api/beginner/pronunciation/words/{topic} (GET) and /api/beginner/pronunciation/assess (POST) both working with Azure Speech SDK. Frontend: BeginnerCourse.js vocabulary section has Listen and Mic buttons. Mic button triggers recording flow with proper error handling. Star rating feedback UI displays correctly based on pronunciation scores.

pronunciation_words_api.details: Returns words with phonetic guides for family, food, daily_life, greetings topics. Unknown topics fall back to greetings.

pronunciation_assess_api.details: Azure Speech SDK integration working. Returns feedback with overall_score, stars (1-5), main_feedback, encouragement, tips, word_feedback, and detailed_scores.

beginner_lessons_api.details: Returns list of beginner lessons with vocabulary sections

frontend_vocabulary_section.details: BeginnerCourse page shows vocabulary words with Listen (speaker) and Record (mic) buttons

frontend_mic_button.details: Mic button clickable, triggers recording flow, handles microphone permission errors gracefully

frontend_feedback_ui.details: Star rating UI (1-5 stars), main_feedback, encouragement, and tips display correctly in code

feedback.encouragement: Try breaking the word into smaller parts.
tips: Try to say each sound clearly
Speak at a steady pace, not too fast
